title: OptimizationMC
description: I got some features of optifine as a modpack
body: This modpack has features of optifine but it's fabric. This modpack has these features of optifine: zoom, FPS boosting,Shaders,Fog Control,Connected Textures,Clear Water,Supports resource packs like Fresh Animations,and thats's the features of optifine it has this modpack also comes with BSL Shaders and others.**This modpack is in beta so it may not have all the features of optifine.**
